content: For a domain with 81 invariants, 14 subdomains, and 67 agents, the gap-hunting convergence trajectory was 22→6→2→0 over 4 cycles, matching the architecture's prediction of '2-4 cycles'. The heaviest gap categories in cycle 1 were artifact coverage and cross-reference integrity (which had 4 gaps resolved by cycle 3). Subdomain coverage, invariant enforcement, and routing completeness were clean from cycle 1 — indicating the roster planner and routing planner produced high-quality initial designs. Gap-hunting effort concentrates on cross-reference and artifact protocol issues introduced during prompt writing, not on structural design.
sourceEvidence: convergenceTrajectory: [22, 6, 2, 0]. Categories 1-3 (Subdomain Coverage, Invariant Enforcement, Routing Completeness) clean since cycle 1. Category 4 (Artifact Coverage) resolved AC-004, AC-005 by cycle 3. Category 6 (Cross-Reference Integrity) resolved CR-004, CR-005. Categories 7-9 clean since cycle 1.

history.reason: Cold start — first observation from initial factory run
